name: Tresiba Flex Touch Pen
about: Tresiba Flex Touch Pen is a general medicine available in liquid form and manufactured in India. It is used as per suggestion and stored in a dry place. The medicine is designed to provide long-lasting and consistent blood sugar control to patients with diabetes. The pen is user-friendly, allowing patients to easily adjust their dosage with the touch of a button. The Tresiba Flex Touch Pen is a reliable and convenient option for diabetic patients who need to manage their blood sugar levels.

faq.q: What is Tresiba Flex Touch Pen used for?
faq.a: Tresiba Flex Touch Pen is used for controlling blood sugar levels in patients with diabetes.

faq.q: How is Tresiba Flex Touch Pen administered?
faq.a: Tresiba Flex Touch Pen is administered subcutaneously (under the skin) using the pens needle.

faq.q: What is the dosage of Tresiba Flex Touch Pen?
faq.a: The dosage of Tresiba Flex Touch Pen should be taken as per the suggestion of the physician.

faq.q: What are the storage instructions for Tresiba Flex Touch Pen?
faq.a: Tresiba Flex Touch Pen should be stored in a dry place.

faq.q: Is Tresiba Flex Touch Pen user-friendly?
faq.a: Yes, Tresiba Flex Touch Pen is user-friendly and allows patients to easily adjust their dosage with the touch of a button.
